known_issues: Missing 18 panels in comic viewer - panels were incorrectly removed

existing_features.title: Identify and fix the bug causing 18 panels to be incorrectly removed or filtered from the comic viewer display
Ensure the repetition removal feature only removes duplicate text content and never removes entire panels from the display
